algorithmSummary.rooms: Generate 4-6 rectangular rooms with deterministic System.Random(seed), then connect room centers with L-shaped corridors.
algorithmSummary.floorAndWalls: Floor cells are rendered as cube tiles; wall cubes are created around floor cells where no neighbor floor exists.
algorithmSummary.playerStart: Player starts at the center of the first generated room.
algorithmSummary.targets: Three recovery targets are selected from reachable valid floor cells, away from player start, away from walls, and not too close to each other.
algorithmSummary.camera: Playable runtime uses a first-person camera parented to the player, controlled by mouse look.
algorithmSummary.runtimeSeed: Normal play assigns a random startup seed and displays it in the HUD. Fixed seeds are used only by validation hooks.

seedValidation.determinism: GenerateWithSeed(seed) is called twice for determinism checks through layout signatures.
seedValidation.differentSeeds: The three layout signatures must not all be identical.
seedValidation.randomStartup: GenerateWithRandomSeed() is sampled twice during validation and must produce different seed values.

reachabilityValidation.method: BFS over cardinal grid neighbors from playerStartCell.

targetPlacementRules: targets must be on valid floor cells
targets must not overlap player start
targets must be reachable from player start
targets should keep at least Manhattan distance 4 from each other
fallbackAndFailureHandling: If random room placement cannot create at least four rooms, a deterministic fallback room layout is used.
If three valid reachable target cells cannot be selected, generation fails and evidence records Failed with failureReason.
If Unity Bridge or compile is unavailable, evidence records Blocked with nextAction.
expectedRisks: Runtime-generated primitive count can grow if map size expands.
Current tutorial remains simple UI text.
Deterministic validation hook is not the same as human navigation path validation.
First-person mouse look now needs manual comfort review.
Public Release Ready is intentionally not claimed.
